chapter_title.en: Chapter 45 – Inheritance of the apostates from Al Islam

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/228)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/228)
text: رَجُلٍ يَمُوتُ مُرْتَدّاً عَنِ الْإِسْلَامِ وَ لَهُ أَوْلَادٌ فَقَالَ مَالُهُ لِوُلْدِهِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, form Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Aban Bin Usman, form the one who mentioned it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who died an apostate (deserter) from Al-Islam, and for him were children. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘His wealth is for his Muslim children’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from those whom he has mentioned who has narrated the following: “About the case of a man who dies as an apostate and has children, abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘His legacy belongs to his Muslim children.”’
